title: ギャルのマストアイテム☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I think there's still time until training—oh crap,
not really. Hmm... What do I do?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. There's a few things I need to buy. I'll
just grab them reeeal quick-like!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Falsies, lotion, nail base coat... Oh, and I'm all
out of makeup remover too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What the... But that has to be it. Ummm... I have
to reset it? Ugh, this suuuucks!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But doing this all over later would suck even
more.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, it'll be fine if I'm just a little late! I literally can not run out of lotion.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that should do it! Huh? Another error?
Whyyyyy?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's online shopping takes a lot longer
than expected, and she ends up missing training
completely.
